---
title: "Keys"
pdf: false
---

Routers from intent to mechanism: reach an article by the effect you want to create or the problem you face, and by component, genre, format, or medium.

- [By Effect](effects.qmd): find an article by the effect or feeling you want to create.
- [By Problem](problems.qmd): find an article by the problem you are hitting.
- [By Component](components.qmd): find an article by the kind of component you are working with.
- [By Genre](genre.qmd): find an article by fictional genre.
- [By Format](format.qmd): find an article by the form of the game or production.
- [By Medium](media.qmd): find an article by medium.
